gene_region.label: CACNA1C transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical CACNA1C genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: CACNA1C encodes the alpha-1C subunit of the L-type voltage-gated calcium channel Cav1.2, central to cardiac excitation-contraction coupling, action potentials, and neuronal calcium signaling.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local CACNA1C bundle is cardiac and neuropsychiatric channel-biology oriented. Rare pathogenic variants have separate clinical implications from common GWAS markers.
variant_effect_overview: Common CACNA1C regulatory markers are studied in psychiatric, neurodevelopmental, and electrophysiology contexts.
Rare high-impact CACNA1C variants require clinical classification and phenotype matching for Timothy syndrome or arrhythmia review.
condition_research_overview: Neuronal calcium signaling and psychiatric GWAS context
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: CACNA1C methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a L-type voltage-gated calcium channel function, excitation-transcription coupling, cardiac action potentials, and neuronal calcium signaling gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for CACNA1C.
Because CACNA1C biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against L-type voltage-gated calcium channel function, excitation-transcription coupling, cardiac action potentials, and neuronal calcium signaling.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use CACNA1C promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for L-type voltage-gated calcium channel function, excitation-transcription coupling, cardiac action potentials, and neuronal calcium signaling.
Neuronal calcium signaling and psychiatric GWAS context

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000151067: CACNA1C coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: CACNA1C biochemical figure starter

biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a CACNA1C calcium-channel thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to L-type calcium channel gating/expression, cardiac action potentials, neuronal calcium signaling, psychiatric GWAS biology, or rare channelopathy review depending on exact allele class.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs1006737 is curated as a CACNA1C marker for Cardiac electrophysiology and action-potential biology, Neuronal calcium signaling and psychiatric GWAS context. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the L-type voltage-gated calcium channel function, excitation-transcription coupling, cardiac action potentials, and neuronal calcium signaling pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag L-type voltage-gated calcium channel function, excitation-transcription coupling, cardiac action potentials, and neuronal calcium signaling.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: Neuronal calcium signaling and psychiatric GWAS context
research_context: Use this marker as a CACNA1C pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs1006737 with CACNA1C methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
